description_long: This is a compact, tracked combat vehicle with a rounded turret and a short-barreled cannon mounted at the front. The hull and turret are covered in sloped armor plating, featuring a camouflage paint scheme of green, brown, and beige with irregular, organic shapes. The vehicle has visible military markings, including numbers and a French flag insignia on the front and turret. The tracks are supported by multiple road wheels and a rear idler, with external stowage and exhaust components visible at the rear. The surface appears hard and metallic, with a matte finish and moderate surface roughness. The vehicle is designed for urban and battlefield environments, providing both mobility and protection for its crew.
description: A compact, tracked combat vehicle with a rounded turret, sloped armor, and a green-brown-beige camouflage pattern. It features visible military markings and robust tracks for urban and battlefield mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded turret, short cannon, sloped frontal armor, and visible French flag and number markings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full track system, turret profile, side markings, and external stowage at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine grilles, rear armor, exhaust system, and the back of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the track system, turret, and camouflage pattern.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible cannon mounted on the front of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped steel armor plating on the hull and turret; thickness appears moderate, with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland-style camouflage with irregular green, brown, and beige shapes.
attribute_military_markings: White numbers ('40144', '30', '40') on the turret and hull, French flag insignia and 'HOTCHKISS' text on the front hull.
